basic_details.job_title: CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Central Salt & Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI)
basic_details.short_information: Central Salt & Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI) has published the Project Associate I Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Associate I position on a contractual basis. Candidates up to 35 years of age holding a B.Tech./ B.E. in Mechanical Engineering or Chemical Engineering, or an M.Sc. in Chemistry from a recognized university or equivalent institute are eligible to apply through email on or before 31 July 2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Women candidates is applicable as per statutory guidelines and CSIR / Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech. / B.E. in Mechanical Engineering or Chemical Engineering, OR M.Sc. in Chemistry from a recognized University or equivalent institute.
qualification.details: B.Tech. / B.E. in Mechanical Engineering or Chemical Engineering, OR M.Sc. in Chemistry from a recognized University or equivalent institute.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.central_salt_marine_chemicals_research_i: B.Tech. / B.E. in Mechanical Engineering or Chemical Engineering, OR M.Sc. in Chemistry from a recognized University or equivalent institute.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSIR CSMCRI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate I Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: B.Tech. / B.E. in Mechanical Engineering or Chemical Engineering, OR M.Sc. in Chemistry from a recognized University or equivalent institute.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Women candidates is applicable as per statutory guidelines and CSIR / Government of India norms.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Associate - I position is 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a B.Tech. / B.E. in Mechanical Engineering or Chemical Engineering, or an M.Sc. in Chemistry from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate - I position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - I role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is between Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 31,000 per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates need to send their application via email to the address specified in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Associate - I post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CSIR CSMCRI located?
faq.answer: CSIR CSMCRI is located in Bhavnagar, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any relaxations in the age limit?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Women candidates as per government norms.
